title: Reranking Flow
description: RerankingProvider receiving query + documents → gateway reranking call → RankedDocument results returned
activity_steps: VALIDATE: Check documents is a list (not associative array) — throw InvalidArgumentException if not
CREATE: RerankingPrompt(documents, query, limit, provider, model)
DISPATCH EVENT: Reranking(invocationId, provider, model, prompt)
CALL GATEWAY: provider->rerankingGateway()->rerank(provider, model, documents, query, limit)
HTTP POST: /rerank with {model, query, documents, top_k?}
RECEIVE: JSON response {data: [{index, relevance_score}], model, usage}
MAP RESULTS: foreach data → new RankedDocument(index, documents[index], relevance_score)
RETURN: new RerankingResponse(RankedDocument[], new Meta(provider, model))
DISPATCH EVENT: Reranked(invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response)
CATCH FailoverableException: dispatch ProviderFailedOver event, continue to next provider
END LOOP: if all providers fail → throw last exception
decision_points: documents is a list? → proceed : throw InvalidArgumentException
limit set? → include top_k in HTTP payload : omit top_k
Ai::rerankingIsFaked()? → record prompt for assertions : skip
provider->rerank() throws FailoverableException? → try next provider : return response
all providers exhausted? → throw last exception
key_participants: VoyageAiProvider (implements RerankingProvider via Reranks + HasRerankingGateway traits)
Reranks (trait: orchestrates event dispatch + gateway call)
RerankingGateway (interface: rerank(provider, model, documents, query, limit))
CreatesVoyageAiClient (trait on VoyageAiGateway: builds HTTP client)
RerankingPrompt (DTO: documents, query, limit, provider, model)
key_relationships: Reranks trait dispatches events and delegates to rerankingGateway()->rerank()
VoyageAiGateway implements RerankingGateway; uses CreatesVoyageAiClient to build HTTP client
PendingReranking supports provider failover via FailoverableException + ProviderFailedOver event

http_details.auth: Bearer token from provider config key

events: Reranking(invocationId, provider, model, prompt) — dispatched before gateway call
Reranked(invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response) — dispatched after gateway call
ProviderFailedOver(provider, model, exception) — dispatched on FailoverableException
important_notes: VoyageAiProvider lazily instantiates VoyageAiGateway for reranking. Failover loops through multiple providers; all must throw FailoverableException to exhaust. Fake mode intercepts via Ai::fakeableRerankingProvider() and FakeRerankingGateway. RankedDocument carries original index into documents array plus relevance score.
